dominant_palette: black, white/cream, gold, silver/graphite, warm tan-leather
composition_vocabulary: The majority of tiles present a single centred emblem or symbol on a plain or near-black ground — heraldic and flat. Product and apparel shots break this rhythm but still lead with a chest or back graphic as the focal point, maintaining an icon-first framing logic throughout.
lighting_quality: Predominantly flat digital illustration or high-key studio product lighting; the few real-world shots use soft ambient or diffuse artificial light — chiaroscuro is absent.
material_textures: line-art ink, embroidery on fabric, denim, red studded leather, polished metal pendant, printed cotton fleece
aesthetic_register: The sample sits firmly in contemporary streetwear-meets-ancient-Egyptian mysticism — protective-symbol talisman culture channelled through apparel graphics and brand logos rather than fine jewellery or heirloom craft.
notably_absent: Precious gemstones, fine-jewellery close-ups, soft natural lighting on metal, negative white space, and any sense of intimate scale or hand-craftsmanship — the hallmarks of an heirloom-jewellery moodboard are almost entirely missing.
